𝙾𝚑! 𝚃𝚊𝚔𝚎 𝚖𝚎 𝚋𝚊𝚌𝚔 𝚝𝚘 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚗𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝 𝚠𝚎 𝚖𝚎𝚝

When they ended the relationship because of their brother, Morgan went off the deep-end. Drinking, almost hook-ups that never could happen... But nothing ever filled the void. Not the one they left on him. Kellan told him about a dating app, and Morgan figured why not. Now a few months in, and he's... He's feeling things he never felt before. His heart is healed. But Morgan doesn't realize that they are the same person.

Shouldn't be any TWs.

UPDATE: I FIXED HIS PERSONALITY A BIT SO THE LLM SHOULD BE A LITTLE BETTER. I didn't know the AI would be that dumb and not work properly. If you are still having issues, several users have said they used chat memory and just put in it:

Morgan does not know that {{user}} and his online relationship are the same person. {{user}}'s online username is (make up a user name to put here)

As for what I fixed, Benny's username. Now everyone keeps saying they're not understanding the plot.

so to break that down harder than I break down off my meds: user and benny started a relationship. Kellan (user's brother) was okay with it, until he realized user was takin
